projects.title: Unmutemann - Social Interaction Platform
projects.description: Developed a web-based social platform enabling users to interact via chat and explore meaningful conversations. Implemented responsive UI using modern frontend technologies.

projects.title: KanoonSaathi - Legal Tech Platform
projects.description: Comprehensive legal-tech platform to simplify access to legal services for individuals and MSMEs. Integrated virtual consultation, AI chatbot, legal info database, and document assistance.

projects.title: Tenant Management System
projects.description: Built a tenant management platform to handle rent tracking, tenant records, and property management efficiently. Designed features like rent collection tracking and admin functionalities.

projects.title: PYQ Website
projects.description: Developed a platform for students to access Previous Year Question papers easily. Implemented user-friendly navigation and structured data organization.

profile.name: Ashu Meena
profile.tagline: Computer Science Student || AI/ML & Web Developer
terminalText: > PASSIONATE ABOUT SCALABLE & IMPACTFUL TECH SOLUTIONS.

journey.title: B.Tech CSE Student
journey.desc: Started Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering at Jaipur National University, Jaipur.

journey.title: IBM SkillsBuild AIML Intern
journey.desc: Hands-on training in AI/ML, data analysis, preprocessing, and model building using Python.

journey.title: Hackathon Winner
journey.desc: Participated and secured winning/recognition positions in multiple college-level hackathons.

journey.title: IBM CSR Annual Event
journey.desc: Recognized as an Active Learner at IBM CSR Annual Event in New Delhi.

bullets: Completed hands-on training in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning through IBM SkillsBuild internship.
Worked on data analysis, preprocessing, and machine learning model building using Python.
Gained practical experience with tools like IBM Watson Studio for solving real-world problems.
Applied concepts such as classification, regression, and data visualization in project-based learning.
Strengthened understanding of AI workflows, teamwork, and industry-level practices.
Recognized as an Active Learner at IBM CSR Annual Event organized by CSRBox.
Attended expert sessions on emerging technologies, AI, and future skill development.
Participated in panel discussion on 'Skilling for the Era of Emerging Technologies' with industry leaders.
Participated in multiple college-level hackathons, collaborating in teams to build innovative tech solutions.
Developed real-world projects under time constraints, focusing on problem-solving and rapid prototyping.
Secured winning/recognition positions in hackathons by presenting impactful and scalable project ideas.
Enhanced skills in teamwork, communication, and project execution in competitive environments.
